title: Run commute perfected
review_text: I run commute 5 miles each way with a full change of clothes, laptop charger, and lunch. Compression straps eliminate bounce. Ventilated back panel keeps sweat manageable.

title: Remove the hip belt
review_text: Hip belt is flimsy and unnecessary. Removed it and just use the sternum strap. Pack stays put at 7-minute mile pace. Wish it had a laptop pocket but it's a running pack.
